models.name: Parakeet TDT 0.6B v2 (English)
models.description: English-only TDT. Best accuracy of the 3 local options. ~661MB.

models.name: Parakeet TDT 0.6B v3 (Multilingual)
models.description: 25 languages, but slightly lower English accuracy than v2. Manual download only (nvidia gated repo). ~456MB.

models.name: Moonshine Base (Quantized)
models.description: Tiny and fast — only 63MB. Optimized for edge/CPU. English-only.

models.name: Whisper Tiny English
models.description: 39M params, English-only, ~150MB INT8. Fastest Whisper option.

models.name: Whisper Base English
models.description: 74M params, English-only, ~300MB INT8. Good balance of speed and accuracy.
